title: GEO/AEO Optimizer
description: Score content for AI answer readiness, citation clarity, entity coverage, and answer-engine structure.

fields.name: content
fields.label: Content draft
fields.placeholder: Paste the article, page, or answer content

fields.name: citations
fields.label: Citations or sources
fields.placeholder: Paste source URLs or citation notes

fields.name: schemaMarkup
fields.label: Schema markup
fields.placeholder: FAQ, Article, Product, Organization, or HowTo JSON-LD

fields.name: platformTargets
fields.label: AI platforms
fields.placeholder: Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT Search, Perplexity

sampleInput.content: ExampleCo helps B2B SaaS teams audit technical SEO, structure answers, and publish evidence-backed guides with clear citations. The page includes FAQs, comparison tables, and named product use cases.
sampleInput.targetQuestions:
What is a technical SEO audit?
How can SaaS teams improve AI search visibility?
Which schema types help answer engines cite a page?
sampleInput.entityTerms: Technical SEO, AI Overviews, ChatGPT Search, schema markup, SaaS growth
sampleInput.platformTargets: Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT Search, Perplexity
